title: Jar Opener for Weak Hands, Seniors with Arthritis, 5 in 1 Multi Function Bottle Opener Lid Opener For Arthritic Hands with Non Slip Rubber Jar opener Gripper Pad
description:
About this item
Specially designed for weak hands - It’s difficult for seniors and arthritis, rheumatoid sufferers, limited hand strength mobility or hand injuries sufferers to complete everyday tasks, especially while cooking. The HUMANFUN set will give your hands the power to open any jar, can or bottle. practical, convenient, save your time and strength, and putting NO extra stress on your fragile hand joint and ligaments!
Ergonomic design - The long handles will provide the strength and leverage you need to open effortlessly, the nonslip handles will ensure safety even when wet, the jar grip will provide superior grip when opening stubborn jars and containers of all sizes.
Easy to use - Place the opener on the lid in the right size, turn it around and easily open the seal, or pull it with the lid opener, it won't slip and save effort. Moreover, it makes us avoid the risk of using a knife to open the lid and lower the chance of hurting.
Open multiple size containers - From small medicine bottles, water and soda bottle, soup cans, cans of cat food, pickles, vacuum sealed jars such as spaghetti sauce, honey, and those slippery smooth ridge lids such as peanut butter.. There is literally nothing you can't open!
Packaging information - You will receive a 4- in- 1 Jar opener, a 5-in-1 Bottle operer and Non Slip Jar Opener Gripper Pad, These tools can be easily stored or hung anywhere without regular maintenance, reusable and useful, It is an indispensable multifunctional kitchen tool in life, enough to meet your daily family needs; it can also be used as a great gift for parents, grandparents, girlfriends, other colleagues and friends.
reviews_5s:
Play Video
I bought the 5-in-1 Multifunction Bottle Opener with a non-slip rubber grip pad to help me open bottles and jars, and it has been extremely useful. I used it to open a water bottle and a small jar of Doña María Mole, and the experience was very positive. The tool is easy to use, even with weak or arthritic hands, as the non-slip grip makes opening any lid effortless.

This 3-piece set is ideal, as it offers different sizes to fit various lid types, from larger ones to smaller ones. The quality is excellent, and the best part is the price, which is very affordable for the usefulness it provides. The photos and videos I’ll take showing how I open the water bottle and the mole jar demonstrate how practical and effective this product is.

In summary, it is an indispensable tool for those who struggle to open containers due to arthritis or weakness in their hands. It’s affordable, effective, and comfortable to use—highly recommended!This product has made it so much easier to open jars and glass bottles (especially the Trader Joes Green Ice Tea bottles, very difficult to open). My hands do not hurt after opening any thing and just makes my life easier.This works great, I was buying it to open jars but I'm now using it daily to open dog food cans, they have the pop up ring and pull back to remove the top but the smaller opener does it all. It pops the top with the end of the handle then grab it with the hook and roll it back pulling the top right off the can. And the rubber mat to hold a jar in your hand is huge, works on any jar. I'll probably never have to replace this either because it's quality madeI am using Siri to write this so please excuse any strange words. I am buying this to replace one that was similar that I purchased about 10 years ago but that one finally met its match. I buy the 101 ounce cranberry juice bottle and it’s got an extremely large unscramble Lid on the top. I use the old one to do it and it exploded in my hand so with some interpretation, I said, let me try to find something similar. I purchased this one and a matter of minutes ago. I just used it to undo the top of the bottle. It worked fine and there was room despair. There seems to be a pretty adequate amount of space to use at the top plus the recessed items that go down the handle when you get the smaller jar, lids bottles, etc. I’m very happy with this. I’m glad I’ve got it if I can get five years out of this I’ll be happy. I’m pretty tough on these kind of items since I have to use them constantly because of my weak hands. Thank you for taking the time to read my review. It’s greatly appreciated.I was disappointed that the large gripper does not work on wide mouth jars as it is not big enough. However, the round flat silicone gripper matt works great on larger sized jars thankfully. It is thicker and has more gripping ability than other round flat grippers I've tried. So, all in all, this is a good set to have.Thank you so much for your prompt delivery of your product. I bought this product because my roommate one of my best friends has MS and he’s starting to lose functionality in his hand. He can’t open yards of Gatorade and it really frustrates him to the point of throwing the bottle With this product. You can open it. One handed almost it gives them back a piece and it makes him feel more like he’s not losing DMS but gaining on it so thank you for everything. You did recommended seller prompt service five stars thank you.These work great. I have a hard time getting water bottle caps off. Removed easily with these. Also can lids. Gave many as gifts for Christmas and they also love them!This product is just as advertised.
I have arthritis in my hands and have difficulty opening bottle's and virtually anything with a twist off cap.
Highly recommend...I'm old with weak hands. This set takes care of most any jar sizes. Smaller kids are easier but should be good for the larger sizes. I like the round gripper thing also. I'm pretty happy so far. Would be a great gift for other old chicks with hand issues.I bought this for myself and my daughter because there's times when we struggle to open jars. And this kit is great! It's durable and it helps you grip the I'm jars better for opening them! The design is good! It's really easy to use! It really helps removing lids a whole lot easier! The material is plastic but it works!
reviews_1s:
You need a strong grip to use this product, it doesn’t work on the larger diameter jars, and it was tricky to fit. I ended up getting a different kind of jar opener with an adjustable rubber strap that has worked for me in the past, so I just ordered one of those.It's supposed to be for weak hands. It slips off the jar cap and is difficult to use. It still takes quite a bit of force to use it.This looked like it would work but the jar opener cannot grip the lid. It just moves around the cap but does not move the cap. It's going back.When I tried to open a large jar top, it kept slipping off and would not open the jar. I returned it for a refund. It might work on smaller tops but I did not need it for that.Very difficult to use for those with paralysis of the hands. Unless both your hands are normal and useable, I don't recommend these items. I feel like you need a third hand to use any of them efficiently.I bought this expecting great things!
I have a weak right wrist so I struggle to open bottles at times. The main opener did not work at all, in fact it only added to my wrist pain and I could not get a jar to open using it.

What did work was the Non Slip Jar Opener Gripper Pad. I will be looking to buy only that in future.The hinge on the large gripper, makes it useless on larger size lids.

I went back to the rigid version.Don't waste your time, this does not grip the basic bottle of cranberry juice. It just slips around it.I bought this for my wife because her arthritis prevents her from opening things. This device was worse than having nothing at all - required too much hand strength.The set looks nice but they are not good for many jars. I don’t recommend them
